# EuroEyes Medical Group — Interim Report H1 2025 (SYNTHETIC FIXTURE)

> **SYNTHETIC DATA — do not interpret as real EuroEyes financials.**

## Financial Highlights H1 2025

Revenue: HKD 315M (H1 2024: 280M, +12.5%)
Operating income: HKD 62M (H1 2024: 52M)
Net income: HKD 42M (H1 2024: 34M)
Total assets: HKD 3,320M (FY2024: 3,200M)
Cash and equivalents: HKD 480M

## Condensed Consolidated Income Statement

| Line item            | H1 2025 | H1 2024 |
|---------------------|---------|---------|
| Revenue              | 315.0   | 280.0   |
| Cost of sales        | (155.0) | (142.0) |
| Operating expenses   | (98.0)  | (86.0)  |
| Operating income     | 62.0    | 52.0    |
| Finance expense, net | (8.0)   | (7.0)   |
| Tax expense          | (12.0)  | (11.0)  |
| Net income           | 42.0    | 34.0    |

## Segment Review

Greater China: Revenue HKD 230M (+10%), margin 22%.
Germany/EU: Revenue EUR 10M (HKD 88M), margin 14%.

## Management Commentary

First-half performance consistent with full-year 2025 guidance. Gross margin
held at 50.8%; S&M investment continues to scale with clinic footprint.
Interim dividend declared at HKD 0.10/share, payable September 2025.
